description_long: This factory building features a large cylindrical main structure with ribbed metallic bands and several tall, curved smokestacks rising from its roof, emitting a faint blue glow. The exterior is dominated by rusted metal panels, giving it a weathered, industrial appearance. Attached to the main cylinder is a long, rectangular annex with a series of vertical fins and mechanical details, suggesting heavy-duty industrial processes. The building is adorned with various pipes, vents, and mechanical components, some of which protrude from the roof and sides, indicating active machinery. The color palette consists mainly of reddish-brown rust tones, accented by darker metallic grays and hints of blue from the glowing elements. The overall design is imposing and utilitarian, with a distinctly industrial, almost steampunk aesthetic.
description: A large, rusted industrial factory building with a cylindrical core, tall smokestacks, and a long annex featuring mechanical details and pipes. The structure is weathered, metallic, and visually complex, with a strong industrial character.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical main structure, prominent smokestacks, and the detailed annex with vertical fins and mechanical elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the annex, the vertical fins, and the arrangement of smokestacks and rooftop machinery.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the cylindrical core, ribbed bands, and the curved smokestacks, with less emphasis on the annex.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the annex, additional smokestacks, and the mechanical complexity of the building's exterior.
